task_completion.description: Verify that 'Attention Is All You Need' is linked to 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero right-hand pane, under the 'Related' tab for either paper, the title of the other paper is listed, or a dialog box shows the successful addition of this link.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero graphical user interface to create the links.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Zotero application window open and the agent interacting with the 'Related' tab and 'Add' dialog, rather than using terminal commands to modify the database.

integrity.description: The agent created actual 'Related' links rather than just adding text notes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The links appear in the specific 'Related' tab of the Zotero item pane, not in the 'Notes' or 'Tags' tabs.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete or modify the actual metadata (titles, authors) of the papers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The titles of the papers in the central list remain intact and match the required pairs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The following 5 pairs of papers must be linked in Zotero: 1) 'Attention Is All You Need' <-> 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding'. 2) 'Attention Is All You Need' <-> 'Language Models are Few-Shot Learners'. 3) 'Deep Learning' <-> 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks'. 4) 'Deep Learning' <-> 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition'. 5) 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' <-> 'Generative Adversarial Nets'. Zotero's 'Related' tab automatically creates bidirectional links when one is added.
